{{Quote|Master Katarn has informed me that he is continuing his investigation of Rosh Penin's disappearance near Nar Kreeta and can assist you on this mission.|[[Jedi Praxeum protocol droid]]|audio=NarKreeta-RescueMission.flac|<ref name="JA" />}}
'''Nar Kreeta''' was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] colony and major trade world, located at the nexus of the [[Pabol Kreeta]] and [[Pabol Sleheyron/Legends|Pabol Sleheyron]].<ref name="TEA" />

==Description==
Nar Kreeta was located near the tip of the [[Boz Pity Salient]] of the [[Kreetan Narrows]] and featured a rocky landscape with mountains and canyons alongside large deserts and aquamarine seas.<ref name="LoNH" />

==History==
[[File:Rancor_poster.jpg|thumb|left|100px|A [[Rancor/Legends|rancor]] poster from the gambling ring]]

===Disciples of Ragnos Crisis===
Nar Kreeta was a focus of the [[New Jedi Order]]'s attention during the [[Disciples of Ragnos]] crisis. A [[Mining Guild/Legends|mining guild]] running on Nar Kreeta informed the [[Jedi Praxeum]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] that several [[Mining Guild elders|elders]] of that guild had gone missing mysteriously. The guild suspected a Hutt connection but the [[Unidentified Hutt crime lord (Nar Kreeta)|local Hutt crime lord]] denied knowledge of any kidnapping.<ref name="JA" />

Jedi [[Jaden Korr]] was [[Mission to Nar Kreeta|dispatched]] to investigate the matter. He covertly entered the Hutt's facility and soon uncovered the fate of the missing elders. The elders were among other captured Humans intended to be used as quarry in labyrinthine pit matches against a [[Rancor/Legends|rancor]], sponsored by the Hutt. The object of the betting was to wager on the last remaining Human to be killed. It became apparent to the Jedi that the building was actually a [[Rancor betting parlor]].<ref name="JA" />

After fighting his way through the gambling parlors and bars, Korr found himself entering the pit. He systematically unbound the prisoners from their holding areas and led them through the labyrinth, warding off the rancor as it approached. After rescuing all sixteen of the captives, Jaden escaped the complex with the elders in his [[Kyle Katarn|master's]] [[Raven's Claw|ship]].<ref name="JA" />

[[File:Nar_kreeta.png|thumb|right|250px|A valley on Nar Kreeta]]

===Yuuzhan Vong invasion===
During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], Nar Kreeta was [[Battle of the Nar Kreeta system|conquered]] and heavily [[Terraforming/Legends|Vongformed]] by the [[Yuuzhan Vong|invaders]].<ref name="TEA" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'' {{1st}}
